    • 7.1 CLI 只负责把输入送进 session
    • 7.2 prompt 创建 user message，然后进入 loop
    • 7.3 loop 是一个状态机
    • 7.4 每一步都创建 assistant message 和工具集合
    • 7.5 LLM service 是一个流式网关
    • 7.6 Tool 接口要先设计好
    • 7.7 SessionTools.resolve 把内部工具包装成模型工具
    • 7.8 权限是工具执行前的闸门
    • 7.9 文件读写和 shell 是最小 coding agent 的两个核心工具
    • 7.10 tool result 被 processor 写回，再进入下一轮
  • 8. 关键 TypeScript 语法复习
    • 8.1 Record<string, Tool>
    • 8.2 literal union
    • 8.3 optional property
    • 8.4 泛型接口
    • 8.5 Omit
    • 8.6 as const
  • 9. 涉及的设计模式和架构思想
    • 9.1 Controller -> Service -> State Machine
    • 9.2 Strategy / Registry
    • 9.3 Adapter
    • 9.4 Event Bus
    • 9.5 Safety Gate
  • 10. 它如何和 Tool、Provider、Session、文件系统协作
  • 11. 如果自己实现 mini agent，这一章对应什么代码
    • 11.1 第一步：定义消息类型
    • 11.2 第二步：定义 Tool 接口
    • 11.3 第三步：写 agent loop
    • 11.4 第四步：实现 read/edit/shell
    • 11.5 第五步：加权限
    • 11.6 第六步：加事件输出
  • 12. 费曼复述区

    • 12.3 换一种说法再解释

从 OpenCode 反推 mini coding agent

状态已完成
难度中等
预计阅读60 分钟
源文件markdown/14-mini-coding-agent.md

Agent 生成档案

Section titled “Agent 生成档案”
  • 章节 ID：14-mini-coding-agent
  • 章节摘要：把 OpenCode 的 CLI、session、LLM、tool、permission 和 processor 源码反推成一个可自己实现的 mini coding agent 闭环。
  • 章节元数据：/data/chapters.json
  • 源码映射：/data/source-map.json

主要源码路径

Section titled “主要源码路径”
  • packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/permission/index.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/tool/read.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/tool/edit.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/tool/shell.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts

0. 本章学习目标

Section titled “0. 本章学习目标”

这一章不是继续介绍 OpenCode 的某个单独模块，而是把前面章节反推成一个你可以自己实现的 mini coding agent。

学完你应该能：

  1. 从 OpenCode 的真实源码里提炼一个最小 agent 架构。
  2. 知道第一版必须保留哪些模块，哪些可以延后。
  3. 能用 Java 后端分层方式理解 TypeScript agent 代码。
  4. 能写出一个 mini agent 的 CLI、Session、LLM、Tool、Permission、事件输出骨架。

1. 一句话讲明白

Section titled “1. 一句话讲明白”

一个 mini coding agent 的最小闭环是：接收用户输入，保存成 session message，调用 LLM，发现 tool call，执行工具并写回 tool result，再把结果发回 LLM，直到模型停止。

这条链路在 OpenCode 里的真实来源主要是：

  • CLI 输入：packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts:768-803

    packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts:768-803 
    768        if (!args.interactive) {769          const events = await client.event.subscribe()770          loop(client, events).catch((e) => {771            console.error(e)772            process.exit(1)773          })774775          if (args.command) {776            const result = await client.session.command({777              sessionID,778              agent,779              model: args.model,780              command: args.command,781              arguments: message,782              variant: args.variant,783            })784            if (result.error) {785              if (!emit("error", { error: result.error })) UI.error(formatRunError(result.error))786              process.exitCode = 1787            }788            return789          }790791          const model = pick(args.model)792          const result = await client.session.prompt({793            sessionID,794            agent,795            model,796            variant: args.variant,797            parts: [...files, { type: "text", text: message }],798          })799          if (result.error) {800            if (!emit("error", { error: result.error })) UI.error(formatRunError(result.error))801            process.exitCode = 1802          }803          return

  • prompt/session 入口：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1211-1230

    packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1211-1230 
    1211    const prompt: (input: PromptInput) => Effect.Effect<MessageV2.WithParts, Image.Error> = Effect.fn(1212      "SessionPrompt.prompt",1213    )(function* (input: PromptInput) {1214      const session = yield* sessions.get(input.sessionID).pipe(Effect.orDie)1215      yield* revert.cleanup(session)1216      const message = yield* createUserMessage(input)1217      yield* sessions.touch(input.sessionID)12181219      const permissions: Permission.Ruleset = []1220      for (const [t, enabled] of Object.entries(input.tools ?? {})) {1221        permissions.push({ permission: t, action: enabled ? "allow" : "deny", pattern: "*" })1222      }1223      if (permissions.length > 0) {1224        session.permission = permissions1225        yield* sessions.setPermission({ sessionID: session.id, permission: permissions })1226      }12271228      if (input.noReply === true) return message1229      return yield* loop({ sessionID: input.sessionID })1230    })

  • agent loop：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1248-1489

    packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1248-1489 
    1248        while (true) {1249          yield* status.set(sessionID, { type: "busy" })1250          yield* slog.info("loop", { step })12511252          let msgs = yield* MessageV2.filterCompactedEffect(sessionID)12531254          const { user: lastUser, assistant: lastAssistant, finished: lastFinished, tasks } = MessageV2.latest(msgs)12551256          if (!lastUser) throw new Error("No user message found in stream. This should never happen.")12571258          const lastAssistantMsg = msgs.findLast(1259            (msg) => msg.info.role === "assistant" && msg.info.id === lastAssistant?.id,1260          )1261          // Some providers return "stop" even when the assistant message contains tool calls.1262          // Keep the loop running so tool results can be sent back to the model.1263          // Skip provider-executed tool parts — those were fully handled within the1264          // provider's stream (e.g. DWS Agent Platform) and don't need a re-loop.1265          const hasToolCalls =1266            lastAssistantMsg?.parts.some((part) => part.type === "tool" && !part.metadata?.providerExecuted) ?? false12671268          if (1269            lastAssistant?.finish &&1270            !["tool-calls"].includes(lastAssistant.finish) &&1271            !hasToolCalls &&1272            lastUser.id < lastAssistant.id1273          ) {1274            yield* slog.info("exiting loop")1275            break1276          }12771278          step++1279          if (step === 1)1280            yield* title({1281              session,1282              modelID: lastUser.model.modelID,1283              providerID: lastUser.model.providerID,1284              history: msgs,1285            }).pipe(Effect.ignore, Effect.forkIn(scope))12861287          const model = yield* getModel(lastUser.model.providerID, lastUser.model.modelID, sessionID)1288          const task = tasks.pop()12891290          if (task?.type === "subtask") {1291            yield* handleSubtask({ task, model, lastUser, sessionID, session, msgs })1292            continue1293          }12941295          if (task?.type === "compaction") {1296            const result = yield* compaction.process({1297              messages: msgs,1298              parentID: lastUser.id,1299              sessionID,1300              auto: task.auto,1301              overflow: task.overflow,1302            })1303            if (result === "stop") break1304            continue1305          }13061307          if (1308            lastFinished &&1309            lastFinished.summary !== true &&1310            (yield* compaction.isOverflow({ tokens: lastFinished.tokens, model }))1311          ) {1312            yield* compaction.create({ sessionID, agent: lastUser.agent, model: lastUser.model, auto: true })1313            continue1314          }13151316          const agent = yield* agents.get(lastUser.agent)1317          if (!agent) {1318            const available = (yield* agents.list()).filter((a) => !a.hidden).map((a) => a.name)1319            const hint = available.length ? ` Available agents: ${available.join(", ")}` : ""1320            const error = new NamedError.Unknown({ message: `Agent not found: "${lastUser.agent}".${hint}` })1321            yield* bus.publish(Session.Event.Error, { sessionID, error: error.toObject() })1322            throw error1323          }1324          const maxSteps = agent.steps ?? Infinity1325          const isLastStep = step >= maxSteps1326          msgs = yield* SessionReminders.apply({ messages: msgs, agent, session }).pipe(1327            Effect.provideService(RuntimeFlags.Service, flags),1328            Effect.provideService(AppFileSystem.Service, fsys),1329            Effect.provideService(Session.Service, sessions),1330          )13311332          const msg: MessageV2.Assistant = {1333            id: MessageID.ascending(),1334            parentID: lastUser.id,1335            role: "assistant",1336            mode: agent.name,1337            agent: agent.name,1338            variant: lastUser.model.variant,1339            path: { cwd: ctx.directory, root: ctx.worktree },1340            cost: 0,1341            tokens: { input: 0, output: 0, reasoning: 0, cache: { read: 0, write: 0 } },1342            modelID: model.id,1343            providerID: model.providerID,1344            time: { created: Date.now() },1345            sessionID,1346          }1347          yield* sessions.updateMessage(msg)13481349          const finalizeInterruptedAssistant = Effect.gen(function* () {1350            if (msg.time.completed) return1351            msg.error ??= MessageV2.fromError(new DOMException("Aborted", "AbortError"), {1352              providerID: msg.providerID,1353              aborted: true,1354            })1355            msg.time.completed = Date.now()1356            yield* sessions.updateMessage(msg)1357          })13581359          const handle = yield* processor1360            .create({1361              assistantMessage: msg,1362              sessionID,1363              model,1364            })1365            .pipe(Effect.onInterrupt(() => finalizeInterruptedAssistant))13661367          const outcome: "break" | "continue" = yield* Effect.gen(function* () {1368            const lastUserMsg = msgs.findLast((m) => m.info.role === "user")1369            const bypassAgentCheck = lastUserMsg?.parts.some((p) => p.type === "agent") ?? false1370            const promptOps = yield* ops()13711372            const tools = yield* SessionTools.resolve({1373              agent,1374              session,1375              model,1376              processor: handle,1377              bypassAgentCheck,1378              messages: msgs,1379              promptOps,1380            }).pipe(1381              Effect.provideService(Plugin.Service, plugin),1382              Effect.provideService(Permission.Service, permission),1383              Effect.provideService(ToolRegistry.Service, registry),1384              Effect.provideService(MCP.Service, mcp),1385              Effect.provideService(Truncate.Service, truncate),1386            )13871388            if (lastUser.format?.type === "json_schema") {1389              tools["StructuredOutput"] = createStructuredOutputTool({1390                schema: lastUser.format.schema,1391                onSuccess(output) {1392                  structured = output1393                },1394              })1395            }13961397            if (step === 1)1398              yield* summary.summarize({ sessionID, messageID: lastUser.id }).pipe(Effect.ignore, Effect.forkIn(scope))13991400            if (step > 1 && lastFinished) {1401              for (const m of msgs) {1402                if (m.info.role !== "user" || m.info.id <= lastFinished.id) continue1403                for (const p of m.parts) {1404                  if (p.type !== "text" || p.ignored || p.synthetic) continue1405                  if (!p.text.trim()) continue1406                  p.text = [1407                    "<system-reminder>",1408                    "The user sent the following message:",1409                    p.text,1410                    "",1411                    "Please address this message and continue with your tasks.",1412                    "</system-reminder>",1413                  ].join("\n")1414                }1415              }1416            }14171418            yield* plugin.trigger("experimental.chat.messages.transform", {}, { messages: msgs })14191420            const [skills, env, instructions, modelMsgs] = yield* Effect.all([1421              sys.skills(agent),1422              sys.environment(model),1423              instruction.system().pipe(Effect.orDie),1424              MessageV2.toModelMessagesEffect(msgs, model),1425            ])1426            const system = [...env, ...instructions, ...(skills ? [skills] : [])]1427            const format = lastUser.format ?? { type: "text" as const }1428            if (format.type === "json_schema") system.push(STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_SYSTEM_PROMPT)1429            const result = yield* handle.process({1430              user: lastUser,1431              agent,1432              permission: session.permission,1433              sessionID,1434              parentSessionID: session.parentID,1435              system,1436              messages: [...modelMsgs, ...(isLastStep ? [{ role: "assistant" as const, content: MAX_STEPS }] : [])],1437              tools,1438              model,1439              toolChoice: format.type === "json_schema" ? "required" : undefined,1440            })14411442            if (structured !== undefined) {1443              handle.message.structured = structured1444              handle.message.finish = handle.message.finish ?? "stop"1445              yield* sessions.updateMessage(handle.message)1446              return "break" as const1447            }14481449            const finished = handle.message.finish && !["tool-calls", "unknown"].includes(handle.message.finish)1450            if (finished && !handle.message.error) {1451              if (format.type === "json_schema") {1452                handle.message.error = new MessageV2.StructuredOutputError({1453                  message: "Model did not produce structured output",1454                  retries: 0,1455                }).toObject()1456                yield* sessions.updateMessage(handle.message)1457                return "break" as const1458              }1459            }14601461            if (result === "stop") return "break" as const1462            if (result === "compact") {1463              yield* compaction.create({1464                sessionID,1465                agent: lastUser.agent,1466                model: lastUser.model,1467                auto: true,1468                overflow: !handle.message.finish,1469              })1470            }1471            return "continue" as const1472          }).pipe(1473            Effect.ensuring(instruction.clear(handle.message.id)),1474            Effect.onInterrupt(() => finalizeInterruptedAssistant),1475          )1476          if (outcome === "break") break1477          continue1478        }14791480        yield* compaction.prune({ sessionID }).pipe(Effect.ignore, Effect.forkIn(scope))1481        return yield* lastAssistant(sessionID)1482      },1483    )14841485    const loop: (input: LoopInput) => Effect.Effect<MessageV2.WithParts> = Effect.fn("SessionPrompt.loop")(function* (1486      input: LoopInput,1487    ) {1488      return yield* state.ensureRunning(input.sessionID, lastAssistant(input.sessionID), runLoop(input.sessionID))1489    })

  • LLM 输入类型：packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:39-60

    packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:39-60 
    39export type StreamInput = {40  user: MessageV2.User41  sessionID: string42  parentSessionID?: string43  model: Provider.Model44  agent: Agent.Info45  permission?: Permission.Ruleset46  system: string[]47  messages: ModelMessage[]48  small?: boolean49  tools: Record<string, Tool>50  retries?: number51  toolChoice?: "auto" | "required" | "none"52}5354export type StreamRequest = StreamInput & {55  abort: AbortSignal56}5758export interface Interface {59  readonly stream: (input: StreamInput) => Stream.Stream<LLMEvent, unknown>60}

  • tool 统一接口：packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:16-45

    packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:16-45 
    16export type Context<M extends Metadata = Metadata> = {17  sessionID: SessionID18  messageID: MessageID19  agent: string20  abort: AbortSignal21  callID?: string22  extra?: { [key: string]: unknown }23  messages: MessageV2.WithParts[]24  metadata(input: { title?: string; metadata?: M }): Effect.Effect<void>25  ask(input: Omit<Permission.Request, "id" | "sessionID" | "tool">): Effect.Effect<void>26}2728export interface ExecuteResult<M extends Metadata = Metadata> {29  title: string30  metadata: M31  output: string32  attachments?: Omit<MessageV2.FilePart, "id" | "sessionID" | "messageID">[]33}3435export interface Def<36  Parameters extends Schema.Decoder<unknown> = Schema.Decoder<unknown>,37  M extends Metadata = Metadata,38> {39  id: string40  description: string41  parameters: Parameters42  jsonSchema?: JSONSchema743  execute(args: Schema.Schema.Type<Parameters>, ctx: Context): Effect.Effect<ExecuteResult<M>>44  formatValidationError?(error: unknown): string45}

  • tool 包装和执行：packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:42-115

    packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:42-115 
    42  const context = (args: Record<string, unknown>, options: ToolExecutionOptions): Tool.Context => ({43    sessionID: input.session.id,44    abort: options.abortSignal!,45    messageID: input.processor.message.id,46    callID: options.toolCallId,47    extra: { model: input.model, bypassAgentCheck: input.bypassAgentCheck, promptOps: input.promptOps },48    agent: input.agent.name,49    messages: input.messages,50    metadata: (val) =>51      input.processor.updateToolCall(options.toolCallId, (match) => {52        if (!["running", "pending"].includes(match.state.status)) return match53        return {54          ...match,55          state: {56            title: val.title,57            metadata: val.metadata,58            status: "running",59            input: args,60            time: { start: Date.now() },61          },62        }63      }),64    ask: (req) =>65      permission66        .ask({67          ...req,68          sessionID: input.session.id,69          tool: { messageID: input.processor.message.id, callID: options.toolCallId },70          ruleset: Permission.merge(input.agent.permission, input.session.permission ?? []),71        })72        .pipe(Effect.orDie),73  })7475  for (const item of yield* registry.tools({76    modelID: ModelID.make(input.model.api.id),77    providerID: input.model.providerID,78    agent: input.agent,79  })) {80    const schema = ProviderTransform.schema(input.model, ToolJsonSchema.fromTool(item))81    tools[item.id] = tool({82      description: item.description,83      inputSchema: jsonSchema(schema),84      execute(args, options) {85        return run.promise(86          Effect.gen(function* () {87            const ctx = context(args, options)88            yield* plugin.trigger(89              "tool.execute.before",90              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID },91              { args },92            )93            const result = yield* item.execute(args, ctx)94            const output = {95              ...result,96              attachments: result.attachments?.map((attachment) => ({97                ...attachment,98                id: PartID.ascending(),99                sessionID: ctx.sessionID,100                messageID: input.processor.message.id,101              })),102            }103            yield* plugin.trigger(104              "tool.execute.after",105              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID, args },106              output,107            )108            if (options.abortSignal?.aborted) {109              yield* input.processor.completeToolCall(options.toolCallId, output)110            }111            return output112          }),113        )114      },115    })

  • tool result 写回：packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:451-500

    packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:451-500 
    451          case "tool-result": {452            const toolCall = yield* readToolCall(value.id)453            const rawOutput = toolResultOutput(value)454            const normalized = yield* Effect.forEach(rawOutput.attachments ?? [], (attachment) =>455              attachment.mime.startsWith("image/")456                ? image.normalize(attachment).pipe(457                    Effect.catchIf(458                      (error) => error instanceof Image.ResizerUnavailableError,459                      () => Effect.succeed(attachment),460                    ),461                    Effect.exit,462                  )463                : Effect.succeed(Exit.succeed<MessageV2.FilePart>(attachment)),464            )465            const omitted = normalized.filter(Exit.isFailure).length466            const attachments = normalized.filter(Exit.isSuccess).map((item) => item.value)467            const output = {468              ...rawOutput,469              output:470                omitted === 0471                  ? rawOutput.output472                  : `${rawOutput.output}\n\n[${omitted} image${omitted === 1 ? "" : "s"} omitted: could not be resized below the image size limit.]`,473              attachments: attachments.length ? attachments : undefined,474            }475            // TODO(v2): Temporary dual-write while migrating session messages to v2 events.476            if (flags.experimentalEventSystem) {477              yield* events.publish(SessionEvent.Tool.Success, {478                sessionID: ctx.sessionID,479                callID: value.id,480                structured: output.metadata,481                content: [482                  {483                    type: "text",484                    text: output.output,485                  },486                  ...(output.attachments?.map((item: MessageV2.FilePart) => ({487                    type: "file" as const,488                    uri: item.url,489                    mime: item.mime,490                    name: item.filename,491                  })) ?? []),492                ],493                provider: {494                  executed: value.providerExecuted === true || toolCall?.part.metadata?.providerExecuted === true,495                },496                timestamp: DateTime.makeUnsafe(Date.now()),497              })498            }499            yield* completeToolCall(value.id, output)500            return

  • 权限审批：packages/opencode/src/permission/index.ts:161-195

    packages/opencode/src/permission/index.ts packages/opencode/src/permission/index.ts:161-195 
    161    const ask = Effect.fn("Permission.ask")(function* (input: AskInput) {162      const { approved, pending } = yield* InstanceState.get(state)163      const { ruleset, ...request } = input164      let needsAsk = false165166      for (const pattern of request.patterns) {167        const rule = evaluate(request.permission, pattern, ruleset, approved)168        log.info("evaluated", { permission: request.permission, pattern, action: rule })169        if (rule.action === "deny") {170          return yield* new DeniedError({171            ruleset: ruleset.filter((rule) => Wildcard.match(request.permission, rule.permission)),172          })173        }174        if (rule.action === "allow") continue175        needsAsk = true176      }177178      if (!needsAsk) return179180      const id = request.id ?? PermissionID.ascending()181      const info = Schema.decodeUnknownSync(Request)({182        id,183        ...request,184      })185      log.info("asking", { id, permission: info.permission, patterns: info.patterns })186187      const deferred = yield* Deferred.make<void, RejectedError | CorrectedError>()188      pending.set(id, { info, deferred })189      yield* bus.publish(Event.Asked, info)190      return yield* Effect.ensuring(191        Deferred.await(deferred),192        Effect.sync(() => {193          pending.delete(id)194        }),195      )

2. 它在 OpenCode agent 中的位置

Section titled “2. 它在 OpenCode agent 中的位置”

这章是前面所有章节的“缩小版总装图”。

OpenCode 是成熟实现，包含：

  • 多入口：CLI、TUI、Desktop、VS Code、SDK/API。
  • 多模型 provider。
  • 内置工具、MCP 工具、插件工具。
  • session 存储、事件流、权限审批、LSP、文件系统、shell。
  • 构建、测试、SDK 生成、跨平台打包。

mini agent 不需要一次实现这些全部能力。第一版只要保留闭环：

3. 生活类比

Section titled “3. 生活类比”

OpenCode 像一间成熟的软件工作室：

  • 用户是产品经理，提出需求。
  • Session 是项目记录本，记录每轮对话和每次工具结果。
  • LLM 是主程，决定下一步要读文件、改代码还是执行命令。
  • Tool 是具体工种，比如读文件、改文件、跑命令。
  • Permission 是安全负责人，危险操作先审批。
  • Processor 是会议纪要员，把主程说的话、调用的工具、工具结果写回记录本。

mini agent 第一版只需要一个小团队：产品经理、主程、两个工种、一个审批开关、一本记录本。

4. Java 开发者类比

Section titled “4. Java 开发者类比”
Mini agent 概念Java 后端类比OpenCode 源码依据
CLI 输入main(String[] args) / Picocli commandrun.ts:768-803
SessionPromptApplication Serviceprompt.ts:1211-1230
Message/PartAggregate + child entitymessage-v2.ts，前面章节已读
Agent loopState machine / workflow engineprompt.ts:1248-1489
LLM serviceGateway / Client adapterllm.ts:39-60
Tool registryStrategy registry / plugin registrysession/tools.ts:75-115
PermissionSpring Security interceptor + async approvalpermission/index.ts:161-195
Event streamApplicationEventPublisher + SSEhandlers/event.ts:21-53

5. 最小源码路径

Section titled “5. 最小源码路径”

如果你只想反推 mini agent，按这个顺序读：

  1. packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts:768-803：非交互 CLI 如何把输入送进 client.session.prompt。
packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts:768-803 
768        if (!args.interactive) {769          const events = await client.event.subscribe()770          loop(client, events).catch((e) => {771            console.error(e)772            process.exit(1)773          })774775          if (args.command) {776            const result = await client.session.command({777              sessionID,778              agent,779              model: args.model,780              command: args.command,781              arguments: message,782              variant: args.variant,783            })784            if (result.error) {785              if (!emit("error", { error: result.error })) UI.error(formatRunError(result.error))786              process.exitCode = 1787            }788            return789          }790791          const model = pick(args.model)792          const result = await client.session.prompt({793            sessionID,794            agent,795            model,796            variant: args.variant,797            parts: [...files, { type: "text", text: message }],798          })799          if (result.error) {800            if (!emit("error", { error: result.error })) UI.error(formatRunError(result.error))801            process.exitCode = 1802          }803          return
  1. packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1211-1230：prompt 如何创建 user message 并进入 loop。
packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1211-1230 
1211    const prompt: (input: PromptInput) => Effect.Effect<MessageV2.WithParts, Image.Error> = Effect.fn(1212      "SessionPrompt.prompt",1213    )(function* (input: PromptInput) {1214      const session = yield* sessions.get(input.sessionID).pipe(Effect.orDie)1215      yield* revert.cleanup(session)1216      const message = yield* createUserMessage(input)1217      yield* sessions.touch(input.sessionID)12181219      const permissions: Permission.Ruleset = []1220      for (const [t, enabled] of Object.entries(input.tools ?? {})) {1221        permissions.push({ permission: t, action: enabled ? "allow" : "deny", pattern: "*" })1222      }1223      if (permissions.length > 0) {1224        session.permission = permissions1225        yield* sessions.setPermission({ sessionID: session.id, permission: permissions })1226      }12271228      if (input.noReply === true) return message1229      return yield* loop({ sessionID: input.sessionID })1230    })
  1. packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1248-1276：loop 如何判断继续还是退出。
packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1248-1276 
1248        while (true) {1249          yield* status.set(sessionID, { type: "busy" })1250          yield* slog.info("loop", { step })12511252          let msgs = yield* MessageV2.filterCompactedEffect(sessionID)12531254          const { user: lastUser, assistant: lastAssistant, finished: lastFinished, tasks } = MessageV2.latest(msgs)12551256          if (!lastUser) throw new Error("No user message found in stream. This should never happen.")12571258          const lastAssistantMsg = msgs.findLast(1259            (msg) => msg.info.role === "assistant" && msg.info.id === lastAssistant?.id,1260          )1261          // Some providers return "stop" even when the assistant message contains tool calls.1262          // Keep the loop running so tool results can be sent back to the model.1263          // Skip provider-executed tool parts — those were fully handled within the1264          // provider's stream (e.g. DWS Agent Platform) and don't need a re-loop.1265          const hasToolCalls =1266            lastAssistantMsg?.parts.some((part) => part.type === "tool" && !part.metadata?.providerExecuted) ?? false12671268          if (1269            lastAssistant?.finish &&1270            !["tool-calls"].includes(lastAssistant.finish) &&1271            !hasToolCalls &&1272            lastUser.id < lastAssistant.id1273          ) {1274            yield* slog.info("exiting loop")1275            break1276          }
  1. packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1325-1440：loop 如何创建 assistant message、resolve tools、调用 processor。
packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1325-1440 
1325          const isLastStep = step >= maxSteps1326          msgs = yield* SessionReminders.apply({ messages: msgs, agent, session }).pipe(1327            Effect.provideService(RuntimeFlags.Service, flags),1328            Effect.provideService(AppFileSystem.Service, fsys),1329            Effect.provideService(Session.Service, sessions),1330          )13311332          const msg: MessageV2.Assistant = {1333            id: MessageID.ascending(),1334            parentID: lastUser.id,1335            role: "assistant",1336            mode: agent.name,1337            agent: agent.name,1338            variant: lastUser.model.variant,1339            path: { cwd: ctx.directory, root: ctx.worktree },1340            cost: 0,1341            tokens: { input: 0, output: 0, reasoning: 0, cache: { read: 0, write: 0 } },1342            modelID: model.id,1343            providerID: model.providerID,1344            time: { created: Date.now() },1345            sessionID,1346          }1347          yield* sessions.updateMessage(msg)13481349          const finalizeInterruptedAssistant = Effect.gen(function* () {1350            if (msg.time.completed) return1351            msg.error ??= MessageV2.fromError(new DOMException("Aborted", "AbortError"), {1352              providerID: msg.providerID,1353              aborted: true,1354            })1355            msg.time.completed = Date.now()1356            yield* sessions.updateMessage(msg)1357          })13581359          const handle = yield* processor1360            .create({1361              assistantMessage: msg,1362              sessionID,1363              model,1364            })1365            .pipe(Effect.onInterrupt(() => finalizeInterruptedAssistant))13661367          const outcome: "break" | "continue" = yield* Effect.gen(function* () {1368            const lastUserMsg = msgs.findLast((m) => m.info.role === "user")1369            const bypassAgentCheck = lastUserMsg?.parts.some((p) => p.type === "agent") ?? false1370            const promptOps = yield* ops()13711372            const tools = yield* SessionTools.resolve({1373              agent,1374              session,1375              model,1376              processor: handle,1377              bypassAgentCheck,1378              messages: msgs,1379              promptOps,1380            }).pipe(1381              Effect.provideService(Plugin.Service, plugin),1382              Effect.provideService(Permission.Service, permission),1383              Effect.provideService(ToolRegistry.Service, registry),1384              Effect.provideService(MCP.Service, mcp),1385              Effect.provideService(Truncate.Service, truncate),1386            )13871388            if (lastUser.format?.type === "json_schema") {1389              tools["StructuredOutput"] = createStructuredOutputTool({1390                schema: lastUser.format.schema,1391                onSuccess(output) {1392                  structured = output1393                },1394              })1395            }13961397            if (step === 1)1398              yield* summary.summarize({ sessionID, messageID: lastUser.id }).pipe(Effect.ignore, Effect.forkIn(scope))13991400            if (step > 1 && lastFinished) {1401              for (const m of msgs) {1402                if (m.info.role !== "user" || m.info.id <= lastFinished.id) continue1403                for (const p of m.parts) {1404                  if (p.type !== "text" || p.ignored || p.synthetic) continue1405                  if (!p.text.trim()) continue1406                  p.text = [1407                    "<system-reminder>",1408                    "The user sent the following message:",1409                    p.text,1410                    "",1411                    "Please address this message and continue with your tasks.",1412                    "</system-reminder>",1413                  ].join("\n")1414                }1415              }1416            }14171418            yield* plugin.trigger("experimental.chat.messages.transform", {}, { messages: msgs })14191420            const [skills, env, instructions, modelMsgs] = yield* Effect.all([1421              sys.skills(agent),1422              sys.environment(model),1423              instruction.system().pipe(Effect.orDie),1424              MessageV2.toModelMessagesEffect(msgs, model),1425            ])1426            const system = [...env, ...instructions, ...(skills ? [skills] : [])]1427            const format = lastUser.format ?? { type: "text" as const }1428            if (format.type === "json_schema") system.push(STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_SYSTEM_PROMPT)1429            const result = yield* handle.process({1430              user: lastUser,1431              agent,1432              permission: session.permission,1433              sessionID,1434              parentSessionID: session.parentID,1435              system,1436              messages: [...modelMsgs, ...(isLastStep ? [{ role: "assistant" as const, content: MAX_STEPS }] : [])],1437              tools,1438              model,1439              toolChoice: format.type === "json_schema" ? "required" : undefined,1440            })
  1. packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:39-60：LLM stream 需要的输入。
packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:39-60 
39export type StreamInput = {40  user: MessageV2.User41  sessionID: string42  parentSessionID?: string43  model: Provider.Model44  agent: Agent.Info45  permission?: Permission.Ruleset46  system: string[]47  messages: ModelMessage[]48  small?: boolean49  tools: Record<string, Tool>50  retries?: number51  toolChoice?: "auto" | "required" | "none"52}5354export type StreamRequest = StreamInput & {55  abort: AbortSignal56}5758export interface Interface {59  readonly stream: (input: StreamInput) => Stream.Stream<LLMEvent, unknown>60}
  1. packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:16-45：工具接口长什么样。
packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:16-45 
16export type Context<M extends Metadata = Metadata> = {17  sessionID: SessionID18  messageID: MessageID19  agent: string20  abort: AbortSignal21  callID?: string22  extra?: { [key: string]: unknown }23  messages: MessageV2.WithParts[]24  metadata(input: { title?: string; metadata?: M }): Effect.Effect<void>25  ask(input: Omit<Permission.Request, "id" | "sessionID" | "tool">): Effect.Effect<void>26}2728export interface ExecuteResult<M extends Metadata = Metadata> {29  title: string30  metadata: M31  output: string32  attachments?: Omit<MessageV2.FilePart, "id" | "sessionID" | "messageID">[]33}3435export interface Def<36  Parameters extends Schema.Decoder<unknown> = Schema.Decoder<unknown>,37  M extends Metadata = Metadata,38> {39  id: string40  description: string41  parameters: Parameters42  jsonSchema?: JSONSchema743  execute(args: Schema.Schema.Type<Parameters>, ctx: Context): Effect.Effect<ExecuteResult<M>>44  formatValidationError?(error: unknown): string45}
  1. packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:42-115：工具如何被包装成模型可调用函数。
packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:42-115 
42  const context = (args: Record<string, unknown>, options: ToolExecutionOptions): Tool.Context => ({43    sessionID: input.session.id,44    abort: options.abortSignal!,45    messageID: input.processor.message.id,46    callID: options.toolCallId,47    extra: { model: input.model, bypassAgentCheck: input.bypassAgentCheck, promptOps: input.promptOps },48    agent: input.agent.name,49    messages: input.messages,50    metadata: (val) =>51      input.processor.updateToolCall(options.toolCallId, (match) => {52        if (!["running", "pending"].includes(match.state.status)) return match53        return {54          ...match,55          state: {56            title: val.title,57            metadata: val.metadata,58            status: "running",59            input: args,60            time: { start: Date.now() },61          },62        }63      }),64    ask: (req) =>65      permission66        .ask({67          ...req,68          sessionID: input.session.id,69          tool: { messageID: input.processor.message.id, callID: options.toolCallId },70          ruleset: Permission.merge(input.agent.permission, input.session.permission ?? []),71        })72        .pipe(Effect.orDie),73  })7475  for (const item of yield* registry.tools({76    modelID: ModelID.make(input.model.api.id),77    providerID: input.model.providerID,78    agent: input.agent,79  })) {80    const schema = ProviderTransform.schema(input.model, ToolJsonSchema.fromTool(item))81    tools[item.id] = tool({82      description: item.description,83      inputSchema: jsonSchema(schema),84      execute(args, options) {85        return run.promise(86          Effect.gen(function* () {87            const ctx = context(args, options)88            yield* plugin.trigger(89              "tool.execute.before",90              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID },91              { args },92            )93            const result = yield* item.execute(args, ctx)94            const output = {95              ...result,96              attachments: result.attachments?.map((attachment) => ({97                ...attachment,98                id: PartID.ascending(),99                sessionID: ctx.sessionID,100                messageID: input.processor.message.id,101              })),102            }103            yield* plugin.trigger(104              "tool.execute.after",105              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID, args },106              output,107            )108            if (options.abortSignal?.aborted) {109              yield* input.processor.completeToolCall(options.toolCallId, output)110            }111            return output112          }),113        )114      },115    })
  1. packages/opencode/src/permission/index.ts:161-195：工具执行前如何 ask。
packages/opencode/src/permission/index.ts packages/opencode/src/permission/index.ts:161-195 
161    const ask = Effect.fn("Permission.ask")(function* (input: AskInput) {162      const { approved, pending } = yield* InstanceState.get(state)163      const { ruleset, ...request } = input164      let needsAsk = false165166      for (const pattern of request.patterns) {167        const rule = evaluate(request.permission, pattern, ruleset, approved)168        log.info("evaluated", { permission: request.permission, pattern, action: rule })169        if (rule.action === "deny") {170          return yield* new DeniedError({171            ruleset: ruleset.filter((rule) => Wildcard.match(request.permission, rule.permission)),172          })173        }174        if (rule.action === "allow") continue175        needsAsk = true176      }177178      if (!needsAsk) return179180      const id = request.id ?? PermissionID.ascending()181      const info = Schema.decodeUnknownSync(Request)({182        id,183        ...request,184      })185      log.info("asking", { id, permission: info.permission, patterns: info.patterns })186187      const deferred = yield* Deferred.make<void, RejectedError | CorrectedError>()188      pending.set(id, { info, deferred })189      yield* bus.publish(Event.Asked, info)190      return yield* Effect.ensuring(191        Deferred.await(deferred),192        Effect.sync(() => {193          pending.delete(id)194        }),195      )
  1. packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:451-500：tool result 如何写回。
packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:451-500 
451          case "tool-result": {452            const toolCall = yield* readToolCall(value.id)453            const rawOutput = toolResultOutput(value)454            const normalized = yield* Effect.forEach(rawOutput.attachments ?? [], (attachment) =>455              attachment.mime.startsWith("image/")456                ? image.normalize(attachment).pipe(457                    Effect.catchIf(458                      (error) => error instanceof Image.ResizerUnavailableError,459                      () => Effect.succeed(attachment),460                    ),461                    Effect.exit,462                  )463                : Effect.succeed(Exit.succeed<MessageV2.FilePart>(attachment)),464            )465            const omitted = normalized.filter(Exit.isFailure).length466            const attachments = normalized.filter(Exit.isSuccess).map((item) => item.value)467            const output = {468              ...rawOutput,469              output:470                omitted === 0471                  ? rawOutput.output472                  : `${rawOutput.output}\n\n[${omitted} image${omitted === 1 ? "" : "s"} omitted: could not be resized below the image size limit.]`,473              attachments: attachments.length ? attachments : undefined,474            }475            // TODO(v2): Temporary dual-write while migrating session messages to v2 events.476            if (flags.experimentalEventSystem) {477              yield* events.publish(SessionEvent.Tool.Success, {478                sessionID: ctx.sessionID,479                callID: value.id,480                structured: output.metadata,481                content: [482                  {483                    type: "text",484                    text: output.output,485                  },486                  ...(output.attachments?.map((item: MessageV2.FilePart) => ({487                    type: "file" as const,488                    uri: item.url,489                    mime: item.mime,490                    name: item.filename,491                  })) ?? []),492                ],493                provider: {494                  executed: value.providerExecuted === true || toolCall?.part.metadata?.providerExecuted === true,495                },496                timestamp: DateTime.makeUnsafe(Date.now()),497              })498            }499            yield* completeToolCall(value.id, output)500            return
  1. packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts:21-53：如果需要 UI，事件流如何输出。
packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts:21-53 
21function eventResponse(bus: Bus.Interface) {22  return Effect.gen(function* () {23    // Subscribe eagerly: the bus subscription is acquired in the request scope24    // at this yield, so any publish from now on is queued for the body-pump25    // fiber to drain — closing the race where Stream.concat(server.connected,26    // lazy-subscribe) used to drop publishes in the prefix-consume window.27    const events = (yield* bus.subscribeAll()).pipe(28      Stream.takeUntil((event) => event.type === Bus.InstanceDisposed.type),29    )30    const heartbeat = Stream.tick("10 seconds").pipe(31      Stream.drop(1),32      Stream.map(() => ({ id: Bus.createID(), type: "server.heartbeat", properties: {} })),33    )3435    log.info("event connected")36    return HttpServerResponse.stream(37      Stream.make({ id: Bus.createID(), type: "server.connected", properties: {} }).pipe(38        Stream.concat(events.pipe(Stream.merge(heartbeat, { haltStrategy: "left" }))),39        Stream.map(eventData),40        Stream.pipeThroughChannel(Sse.encode()),41        Stream.encodeText,42        Stream.ensuring(Effect.sync(() => log.info("event disconnected"))),43      ),44      {45        contentType: "text/event-stream",46        headers: {47          "Cache-Control": "no-cache, no-transform",48          "X-Accel-Buffering": "no",49          "X-Content-Type-Options": "nosniff",50        },51      },52    )53  })

6. 用户输入到 agent 行动的整体链路

Section titled “6. 用户输入到 agent 行动的整体链路”

以非交互 CLI 为例，OpenCode 的链路是：

如果你自己实现 mini agent，可以先不做 TUI、Desktop、MCP、插件、LSP，只保留这条链路。

7. 核心源码逐段讲解

Section titled “7. 核心源码逐段讲解”

7.1 CLI 只负责把输入送进 session

Section titled “7.1 CLI 只负责把输入送进 session”

路径：packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts:768-803

packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts:768-803 
768        if (!args.interactive) {769          const events = await client.event.subscribe()770          loop(client, events).catch((e) => {771            console.error(e)772            process.exit(1)773          })774775          if (args.command) {776            const result = await client.session.command({777              sessionID,778              agent,779              model: args.model,780              command: args.command,781              arguments: message,782              variant: args.variant,783            })784            if (result.error) {785              if (!emit("error", { error: result.error })) UI.error(formatRunError(result.error))786              process.exitCode = 1787            }788            return789          }790791          const model = pick(args.model)792          const result = await client.session.prompt({793            sessionID,794            agent,795            model,796            variant: args.variant,797            parts: [...files, { type: "text", text: message }],798          })799          if (result.error) {800            if (!emit("error", { error: result.error })) UI.error(formatRunError(result.error))801            process.exitCode = 1802          }803          return

这段对 mini agent 的启发：CLI 不应该直接实现 agent loop。CLI 只负责解析参数、整理 parts，然后调用 session service。

Java 类比：Controller 不写业务状态机，只调用 Application Service。

7.2 prompt 创建 user message，然后进入 loop

Section titled “7.2 prompt 创建 user message，然后进入 loop”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1211-1230

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1211-1230 
1211    const prompt: (input: PromptInput) => Effect.Effect<MessageV2.WithParts, Image.Error> = Effect.fn(1212      "SessionPrompt.prompt",1213    )(function* (input: PromptInput) {1214      const session = yield* sessions.get(input.sessionID).pipe(Effect.orDie)1215      yield* revert.cleanup(session)1216      const message = yield* createUserMessage(input)1217      yield* sessions.touch(input.sessionID)12181219      const permissions: Permission.Ruleset = []1220      for (const [t, enabled] of Object.entries(input.tools ?? {})) {1221        permissions.push({ permission: t, action: enabled ? "allow" : "deny", pattern: "*" })1222      }1223      if (permissions.length > 0) {1224        session.permission = permissions1225        yield* sessions.setPermission({ sessionID: session.id, permission: permissions })1226      }12271228      if (input.noReply === true) return message1229      return yield* loop({ sessionID: input.sessionID })1230    })

mini agent 第一版可以简化成：

关键不是 Effect 语法，而是职责边界：prompt 负责写入用户消息，loop 负责后续推理。

7.3 loop 是一个状态机

Section titled “7.3 loop 是一个状态机”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1248-1276

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1248-1276 
1248        while (true) {1249          yield* status.set(sessionID, { type: "busy" })1250          yield* slog.info("loop", { step })12511252          let msgs = yield* MessageV2.filterCompactedEffect(sessionID)12531254          const { user: lastUser, assistant: lastAssistant, finished: lastFinished, tasks } = MessageV2.latest(msgs)12551256          if (!lastUser) throw new Error("No user message found in stream. This should never happen.")12571258          const lastAssistantMsg = msgs.findLast(1259            (msg) => msg.info.role === "assistant" && msg.info.id === lastAssistant?.id,1260          )1261          // Some providers return "stop" even when the assistant message contains tool calls.1262          // Keep the loop running so tool results can be sent back to the model.1263          // Skip provider-executed tool parts — those were fully handled within the1264          // provider's stream (e.g. DWS Agent Platform) and don't need a re-loop.1265          const hasToolCalls =1266            lastAssistantMsg?.parts.some((part) => part.type === "tool" && !part.metadata?.providerExecuted) ?? false12671268          if (1269            lastAssistant?.finish &&1270            !["tool-calls"].includes(lastAssistant.finish) &&1271            !hasToolCalls &&1272            lastUser.id < lastAssistant.id1273          ) {1274            yield* slog.info("exiting loop")1275            break1276          }

这就是 agent 的心脏：不是“调用一次 LLM 就结束”，而是根据 message 状态判断是否继续。

mini agent 可以先用更简单的条件：

7.4 每一步都创建 assistant message 和工具集合

Section titled “7.4 每一步都创建 assistant message 和工具集合”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1325-1440

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1325-1440 
1325          const isLastStep = step >= maxSteps1326          msgs = yield* SessionReminders.apply({ messages: msgs, agent, session }).pipe(1327            Effect.provideService(RuntimeFlags.Service, flags),1328            Effect.provideService(AppFileSystem.Service, fsys),1329            Effect.provideService(Session.Service, sessions),1330          )13311332          const msg: MessageV2.Assistant = {1333            id: MessageID.ascending(),1334            parentID: lastUser.id,1335            role: "assistant",1336            mode: agent.name,1337            agent: agent.name,1338            variant: lastUser.model.variant,1339            path: { cwd: ctx.directory, root: ctx.worktree },1340            cost: 0,1341            tokens: { input: 0, output: 0, reasoning: 0, cache: { read: 0, write: 0 } },1342            modelID: model.id,1343            providerID: model.providerID,1344            time: { created: Date.now() },1345            sessionID,1346          }1347          yield* sessions.updateMessage(msg)13481349          const finalizeInterruptedAssistant = Effect.gen(function* () {1350            if (msg.time.completed) return1351            msg.error ??= MessageV2.fromError(new DOMException("Aborted", "AbortError"), {1352              providerID: msg.providerID,1353              aborted: true,1354            })1355            msg.time.completed = Date.now()1356            yield* sessions.updateMessage(msg)1357          })13581359          const handle = yield* processor1360            .create({1361              assistantMessage: msg,1362              sessionID,1363              model,1364            })1365            .pipe(Effect.onInterrupt(() => finalizeInterruptedAssistant))13661367          const outcome: "break" | "continue" = yield* Effect.gen(function* () {1368            const lastUserMsg = msgs.findLast((m) => m.info.role === "user")1369            const bypassAgentCheck = lastUserMsg?.parts.some((p) => p.type === "agent") ?? false1370            const promptOps = yield* ops()13711372            const tools = yield* SessionTools.resolve({1373              agent,1374              session,1375              model,1376              processor: handle,1377              bypassAgentCheck,1378              messages: msgs,1379              promptOps,1380            }).pipe(1381              Effect.provideService(Plugin.Service, plugin),1382              Effect.provideService(Permission.Service, permission),1383              Effect.provideService(ToolRegistry.Service, registry),1384              Effect.provideService(MCP.Service, mcp),1385              Effect.provideService(Truncate.Service, truncate),1386            )13871388            if (lastUser.format?.type === "json_schema") {1389              tools["StructuredOutput"] = createStructuredOutputTool({1390                schema: lastUser.format.schema,1391                onSuccess(output) {1392                  structured = output1393                },1394              })1395            }13961397            if (step === 1)1398              yield* summary.summarize({ sessionID, messageID: lastUser.id }).pipe(Effect.ignore, Effect.forkIn(scope))13991400            if (step > 1 && lastFinished) {1401              for (const m of msgs) {1402                if (m.info.role !== "user" || m.info.id <= lastFinished.id) continue1403                for (const p of m.parts) {1404                  if (p.type !== "text" || p.ignored || p.synthetic) continue1405                  if (!p.text.trim()) continue1406                  p.text = [1407                    "<system-reminder>",1408                    "The user sent the following message:",1409                    p.text,1410                    "",1411                    "Please address this message and continue with your tasks.",1412                    "</system-reminder>",1413                  ].join("\n")1414                }1415              }1416            }14171418            yield* plugin.trigger("experimental.chat.messages.transform", {}, { messages: msgs })14191420            const [skills, env, instructions, modelMsgs] = yield* Effect.all([1421              sys.skills(agent),1422              sys.environment(model),1423              instruction.system().pipe(Effect.orDie),1424              MessageV2.toModelMessagesEffect(msgs, model),1425            ])1426            const system = [...env, ...instructions, ...(skills ? [skills] : [])]1427            const format = lastUser.format ?? { type: "text" as const }1428            if (format.type === "json_schema") system.push(STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_SYSTEM_PROMPT)1429            const result = yield* handle.process({1430              user: lastUser,1431              agent,1432              permission: session.permission,1433              sessionID,1434              parentSessionID: session.parentID,1435              system,1436              messages: [...modelMsgs, ...(isLastStep ? [{ role: "assistant" as const, content: MAX_STEPS }] : [])],1437              tools,1438              model,1439              toolChoice: format.type === "json_schema" ? "required" : undefined,1440            })

这给 mini agent 一个很重要的设计：LLM 调用前要准备好 4 样东西：

  • 当前 user / session。
  • system prompts。
  • 历史 messages。
  • tools。

7.5 LLM service 是一个流式网关

Section titled “7.5 LLM service 是一个流式网关”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:39-60

packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:39-60 
39export type StreamInput = {40  user: MessageV2.User41  sessionID: string42  parentSessionID?: string43  model: Provider.Model44  agent: Agent.Info45  permission?: Permission.Ruleset46  system: string[]47  messages: ModelMessage[]48  small?: boolean49  tools: Record<string, Tool>50  retries?: number51  toolChoice?: "auto" | "required" | "none"52}5354export type StreamRequest = StreamInput & {55  abort: AbortSignal56}5758export interface Interface {59  readonly stream: (input: StreamInput) => Stream.Stream<LLMEvent, unknown>60}

mini agent 的 LlmClient 可以先简单很多：

这是教学示例，不是 OpenCode 源码。

7.6 Tool 接口要先设计好

Section titled “7.6 Tool 接口要先设计好”

路径：packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:16-45

packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:16-45 
16export type Context<M extends Metadata = Metadata> = {17  sessionID: SessionID18  messageID: MessageID19  agent: string20  abort: AbortSignal21  callID?: string22  extra?: { [key: string]: unknown }23  messages: MessageV2.WithParts[]24  metadata(input: { title?: string; metadata?: M }): Effect.Effect<void>25  ask(input: Omit<Permission.Request, "id" | "sessionID" | "tool">): Effect.Effect<void>26}2728export interface ExecuteResult<M extends Metadata = Metadata> {29  title: string30  metadata: M31  output: string32  attachments?: Omit<MessageV2.FilePart, "id" | "sessionID" | "messageID">[]33}3435export interface Def<36  Parameters extends Schema.Decoder<unknown> = Schema.Decoder<unknown>,37  M extends Metadata = Metadata,38> {39  id: string40  description: string41  parameters: Parameters42  jsonSchema?: JSONSchema743  execute(args: Schema.Schema.Type<Parameters>, ctx: Context): Effect.Effect<ExecuteResult<M>>44  formatValidationError?(error: unknown): string45}

这个接口说明，工具不只是一个函数。工具需要：

  • 参数 schema。
  • 执行上下文。
  • 权限申请能力。
  • 结果 metadata。
  • 可选附件。

mini agent 第一版至少保留 id、description、parameters、execute。

7.7 SessionTools.resolve 把内部工具包装成模型工具

Section titled “7.7 SessionTools.resolve 把内部工具包装成模型工具”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:42-115

packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:42-115 
42  const context = (args: Record<string, unknown>, options: ToolExecutionOptions): Tool.Context => ({43    sessionID: input.session.id,44    abort: options.abortSignal!,45    messageID: input.processor.message.id,46    callID: options.toolCallId,47    extra: { model: input.model, bypassAgentCheck: input.bypassAgentCheck, promptOps: input.promptOps },48    agent: input.agent.name,49    messages: input.messages,50    metadata: (val) =>51      input.processor.updateToolCall(options.toolCallId, (match) => {52        if (!["running", "pending"].includes(match.state.status)) return match53        return {54          ...match,55          state: {56            title: val.title,57            metadata: val.metadata,58            status: "running",59            input: args,60            time: { start: Date.now() },61          },62        }63      }),64    ask: (req) =>65      permission66        .ask({67          ...req,68          sessionID: input.session.id,69          tool: { messageID: input.processor.message.id, callID: options.toolCallId },70          ruleset: Permission.merge(input.agent.permission, input.session.permission ?? []),71        })72        .pipe(Effect.orDie),73  })7475  for (const item of yield* registry.tools({76    modelID: ModelID.make(input.model.api.id),77    providerID: input.model.providerID,78    agent: input.agent,79  })) {80    const schema = ProviderTransform.schema(input.model, ToolJsonSchema.fromTool(item))81    tools[item.id] = tool({82      description: item.description,83      inputSchema: jsonSchema(schema),84      execute(args, options) {85        return run.promise(86          Effect.gen(function* () {87            const ctx = context(args, options)88            yield* plugin.trigger(89              "tool.execute.before",90              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID },91              { args },92            )93            const result = yield* item.execute(args, ctx)94            const output = {95              ...result,96              attachments: result.attachments?.map((attachment) => ({97                ...attachment,98                id: PartID.ascending(),99                sessionID: ctx.sessionID,100                messageID: input.processor.message.id,101              })),102            }103            yield* plugin.trigger(104              "tool.execute.after",105              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID, args },106              output,107            )108            if (options.abortSignal?.aborted) {109              yield* input.processor.completeToolCall(options.toolCallId, output)110            }111            return output112          }),113        )114      },115    })

这里有一个适配器模式：OpenCode 内部 Tool 和 AI SDK 需要的 tool(...) 不是同一个接口，所以 SessionTools.resolve 做了转换。

mini agent 如果直接调用某个 provider SDK，也可能需要这一层。

7.8 权限是工具执行前的闸门

Section titled “7.8 权限是工具执行前的闸门”

路径：packages/opencode/src/permission/index.ts:161-195

packages/opencode/src/permission/index.ts packages/opencode/src/permission/index.ts:161-195 
161    const ask = Effect.fn("Permission.ask")(function* (input: AskInput) {162      const { approved, pending } = yield* InstanceState.get(state)163      const { ruleset, ...request } = input164      let needsAsk = false165166      for (const pattern of request.patterns) {167        const rule = evaluate(request.permission, pattern, ruleset, approved)168        log.info("evaluated", { permission: request.permission, pattern, action: rule })169        if (rule.action === "deny") {170          return yield* new DeniedError({171            ruleset: ruleset.filter((rule) => Wildcard.match(request.permission, rule.permission)),172          })173        }174        if (rule.action === "allow") continue175        needsAsk = true176      }177178      if (!needsAsk) return179180      const id = request.id ?? PermissionID.ascending()181      const info = Schema.decodeUnknownSync(Request)({182        id,183        ...request,184      })185      log.info("asking", { id, permission: info.permission, patterns: info.patterns })186187      const deferred = yield* Deferred.make<void, RejectedError | CorrectedError>()188      pending.set(id, { info, deferred })189      yield* bus.publish(Event.Asked, info)190      return yield* Effect.ensuring(191        Deferred.await(deferred),192        Effect.sync(() => {193          pending.delete(id)194        }),195      )

mini agent 可以先实现同步版：

但是架构上最好保留 PermissionService.ask(...)，因为以后接 TUI 或 Web UI 时，审批会变成异步。

7.9 文件读写和 shell 是最小 coding agent 的两个核心工具

Section titled “7.9 文件读写和 shell 是最小 coding agent 的两个核心工具”

读文件路径：packages/opencode/src/tool/read.ts:29-39

packages/opencode/src/tool/read.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/read.ts:29-39 
29export const Parameters = Schema.Struct({30  filePath: Schema.String.annotate({ description: "The absolute path to the file or directory to read" }),31  offset: Schema.optional(NonNegativeInt).annotate({32    description: "The line number to start reading from (1-indexed)",33  }),34  limit: Schema.optional(NonNegativeInt).annotate({35    description: "The maximum number of lines to read (defaults to 2000)",36  }),37})3839export const ReadTool = Tool.define(

编辑文件路径：packages/opencode/src/tool/edit.ts:47-69

packages/opencode/src/tool/edit.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/edit.ts:47-69 
47export const Parameters = Schema.Struct({48  filePath: Schema.String.annotate({ description: "The absolute path to the file to modify" }),49  oldString: Schema.String.annotate({ description: "The text to replace" }),50  newString: Schema.String.annotate({51    description: "The text to replace it with (must be different from oldString)",52  }),53  replaceAll: Schema.optional(Schema.Boolean).annotate({54    description: "Replace all occurrences of oldString (default false)",55  }),56})5758export const EditTool = Tool.define(59  "edit",60  Effect.gen(function* () {61    const lsp = yield* LSP.Service62    const afs = yield* AppFileSystem.Service63    const format = yield* Format.Service64    const bus = yield* Bus.Service6566    return {67      description: DESCRIPTION,68      parameters: Parameters,69      execute: (params: Schema.Schema.Type<typeof Parameters>, ctx: Tool.Context) =>

Shell 路径：packages/opencode/src/tool/shell.ts:260-287

packages/opencode/src/tool/shell.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/shell.ts:260-287 
260const parse = Effect.fn("ShellTool.parse")(function* (command: string, ps: boolean) {261  const tree = yield* Effect.promise(() => parser().then((p) => (ps ? p.ps : p.bash).parse(command)))262  if (!tree) throw new Error("Failed to parse command")263  return tree264})265266const ask = Effect.fn("ShellTool.ask")(function* (ctx: Tool.Context, scan: Scan) {267  if (scan.dirs.size > 0) {268    const globs = Array.from(scan.dirs).map((dir) => {269      if (process.platform === "win32") return AppFileSystem.normalizePathPattern(path.join(dir, "*"))270      return path.join(dir, "*")271    })272    yield* ctx.ask({273      permission: "external_directory",274      patterns: globs,275      always: globs,276      metadata: {},277    })278  }279280  if (scan.patterns.size === 0) return281  yield* ctx.ask({282    permission: ShellID.ToolID,283    patterns: Array.from(scan.patterns),284    always: Array.from(scan.always),285    metadata: {},286  })287})

mini agent 第一版可以只做：

  • read_file
  • edit_file
  • run_shell

并给 edit_file 和 run_shell 加权限确认。

7.10 tool result 被 processor 写回，再进入下一轮

Section titled “7.10 tool result 被 processor 写回，再进入下一轮”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:451-500

packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:451-500 
451          case "tool-result": {452            const toolCall = yield* readToolCall(value.id)453            const rawOutput = toolResultOutput(value)454            const normalized = yield* Effect.forEach(rawOutput.attachments ?? [], (attachment) =>455              attachment.mime.startsWith("image/")456                ? image.normalize(attachment).pipe(457                    Effect.catchIf(458                      (error) => error instanceof Image.ResizerUnavailableError,459                      () => Effect.succeed(attachment),460                    ),461                    Effect.exit,462                  )463                : Effect.succeed(Exit.succeed<MessageV2.FilePart>(attachment)),464            )465            const omitted = normalized.filter(Exit.isFailure).length466            const attachments = normalized.filter(Exit.isSuccess).map((item) => item.value)467            const output = {468              ...rawOutput,469              output:470                omitted === 0471                  ? rawOutput.output472                  : `${rawOutput.output}\n\n[${omitted} image${omitted === 1 ? "" : "s"} omitted: could not be resized below the image size limit.]`,473              attachments: attachments.length ? attachments : undefined,474            }475            // TODO(v2): Temporary dual-write while migrating session messages to v2 events.476            if (flags.experimentalEventSystem) {477              yield* events.publish(SessionEvent.Tool.Success, {478                sessionID: ctx.sessionID,479                callID: value.id,480                structured: output.metadata,481                content: [482                  {483                    type: "text",484                    text: output.output,485                  },486                  ...(output.attachments?.map((item: MessageV2.FilePart) => ({487                    type: "file" as const,488                    uri: item.url,489                    mime: item.mime,490                    name: item.filename,491                  })) ?? []),492                ],493                provider: {494                  executed: value.providerExecuted === true || toolCall?.part.metadata?.providerExecuted === true,495                },496                timestamp: DateTime.makeUnsafe(Date.now()),497              })498            }499            yield* completeToolCall(value.id, output)500            return

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1449-1477

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1449-1477 
1449            const finished = handle.message.finish && !["tool-calls", "unknown"].includes(handle.message.finish)1450            if (finished && !handle.message.error) {1451              if (format.type === "json_schema") {1452                handle.message.error = new MessageV2.StructuredOutputError({1453                  message: "Model did not produce structured output",1454                  retries: 0,1455                }).toObject()1456                yield* sessions.updateMessage(handle.message)1457                return "break" as const1458              }1459            }14601461            if (result === "stop") return "break" as const1462            if (result === "compact") {1463              yield* compaction.create({1464                sessionID,1465                agent: lastUser.agent,1466                model: lastUser.model,1467                auto: true,1468                overflow: !handle.message.finish,1469              })1470            }1471            return "continue" as const1472          }).pipe(1473            Effect.ensuring(instruction.clear(handle.message.id)),1474            Effect.onInterrupt(() => finalizeInterruptedAssistant),1475          )1476          if (outcome === "break") break1477          continue

这就是“工具执行结果回到模型”的关键。mini agent 一定要把 tool result 写进 messages，否则下一轮 LLM 不知道工具做了什么。

8. 关键 TypeScript 语法复习

Section titled “8. 关键 TypeScript 语法复习”

8.1 Record<string, Tool>

Section titled “8.1 Record<string, Tool>”

来源：packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:49

packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:49 
49  tools: Record<string, Tool>

表示一个 key 是 string、value 是 Tool 的对象。Java 类比：Map<String, Tool>。

8.2 literal union

Section titled “8.2 literal union”

来源：packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:51

packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:51 
51  toolChoice?: "auto" | "required" | "none"

这比 Java enum 更轻量，运行时只是字符串，编译期限制只能取这三个值。

8.3 optional property

Section titled “8.3 optional property”

来源：packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:42-51

packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:42-51 
42  parentSessionID?: string43  model: Provider.Model44  agent: Agent.Info45  permission?: Permission.Ruleset46  system: string[]47  messages: ModelMessage[]48  small?: boolean49  tools: Record<string, Tool>50  retries?: number51  toolChoice?: "auto" | "required" | "none"

? 表示字段可以是 undefined。Java 类比是 nullable field，但 TS 会在类型层提醒你处理。

8.4 泛型接口

Section titled “8.4 泛型接口”

来源：packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:28-45

packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:28-45 
28export interface ExecuteResult<M extends Metadata = Metadata> {29  title: string30  metadata: M31  output: string32  attachments?: Omit<MessageV2.FilePart, "id" | "sessionID" | "messageID">[]33}3435export interface Def<36  Parameters extends Schema.Decoder<unknown> = Schema.Decoder<unknown>,37  M extends Metadata = Metadata,38> {39  id: string40  description: string41  parameters: Parameters42  jsonSchema?: JSONSchema743  execute(args: Schema.Schema.Type<Parameters>, ctx: Context): Effect.Effect<ExecuteResult<M>>44  formatValidationError?(error: unknown): string45}

M extends Metadata = Metadata 表示 metadata 类型可定制，默认是 Metadata。Java 类比：class ExecuteResult<M extends Metadata>，但 TS 可以给泛型默认值。

8.5 Omit

Section titled “8.5 Omit”

来源：packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:25

packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:25 
25  ask(input: Omit<Permission.Request, "id" | "sessionID" | "tool">): Effect.Effect<void>

工具调用 ask 时不需要自己填 id/sessionID/tool，这些由上下文补齐。Java 里通常会建一个 PermissionRequestDraft DTO；TS 可以直接用 Omit 从已有类型裁剪。

8.6 as const

Section titled “8.6 as const”

来源：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1436

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1436 
1436              messages: [...modelMsgs, ...(isLastStep ? [{ role: "assistant" as const, content: MAX_STEPS }] : [])],

as const 让 "assistant" 保持字面量类型，而不是泛化成 string。

9. 涉及的设计模式和架构思想

Section titled “9. 涉及的设计模式和架构思想”

9.1 Controller -> Service -> State Machine

Section titled “9.1 Controller -> Service -> State Machine”

run.ts 像 Controller；SessionPrompt.prompt 像 Application Service；runLoop 是状态机。

9.2 Strategy / Registry

Section titled “9.2 Strategy / Registry”

每个 tool 是一个 strategy；registry 根据 agent/model 选出可用工具。来源：session/tools.ts:75-115。

9.3 Adapter

Section titled “9.3 Adapter”

内部 Tool 接口被适配成 provider/AI SDK 可调用的 tool。来源：session/tools.ts:80-115。

9.4 Event Bus

Section titled “9.4 Event Bus”

权限请求和 server event stream 都依赖事件发布。来源：permission/index.ts:187-190、handlers/event.ts:21-53。

9.5 Safety Gate

Section titled “9.5 Safety Gate”

文件编辑和 shell 执行必须经过权限层。来源：edit.ts:98-107、shell.ts:266-287、permission/index.ts:161-195。

10. 它如何和 Tool、Provider、Session、文件系统协作

Section titled “10. 它如何和 Tool、Provider、Session、文件系统协作”

mini agent 里可以压缩成 5 个服务：

服务职责OpenCode 对应
SessionStore保存 user/assistant/tool messagesSession.Service、MessageV2
AgentLoopwhile 循环，判断继续/停止SessionPrompt.runLoop
LlmClient把 messages/tools 发给模型并返回事件LLM.Service
ToolRegistry管理 read/edit/shell 工具ToolRegistry.Service、SessionTools.resolve
PermissionServiceallow/deny/askPermission.Service

不要一开始就做插件、MCP、TUI、LSP。先做闭环，再加能力。

11. 如果自己实现 mini agent，这一章对应什么代码

Section titled “11. 如果自己实现 mini agent，这一章对应什么代码”

下面是建议实现顺序。示例代码是“你可以自己写的 mini agent 草图”，不是 OpenCode 源码。

11.1 第一步：定义消息类型

Section titled “11.1 第一步：定义消息类型”

对应 OpenCode：MessageV2.User、MessageV2.Assistant、tool part。

11.2 第二步：定义 Tool 接口

Section titled “11.2 第二步：定义 Tool 接口”

对应 OpenCode：packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:16-45。

packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:16-45 
16export type Context<M extends Metadata = Metadata> = {17  sessionID: SessionID18  messageID: MessageID19  agent: string20  abort: AbortSignal21  callID?: string22  extra?: { [key: string]: unknown }23  messages: MessageV2.WithParts[]24  metadata(input: { title?: string; metadata?: M }): Effect.Effect<void>25  ask(input: Omit<Permission.Request, "id" | "sessionID" | "tool">): Effect.Effect<void>26}2728export interface ExecuteResult<M extends Metadata = Metadata> {29  title: string30  metadata: M31  output: string32  attachments?: Omit<MessageV2.FilePart, "id" | "sessionID" | "messageID">[]33}3435export interface Def<36  Parameters extends Schema.Decoder<unknown> = Schema.Decoder<unknown>,37  M extends Metadata = Metadata,38> {39  id: string40  description: string41  parameters: Parameters42  jsonSchema?: JSONSchema743  execute(args: Schema.Schema.Type<Parameters>, ctx: Context): Effect.Effect<ExecuteResult<M>>44  formatValidationError?(error: unknown): string45}

11.3 第三步：写 agent loop

Section titled “11.3 第三步：写 agent loop”

对应 OpenCode：prompt.ts:1248-1489、session/tools.ts:42-115、processor.ts:451-500。

11.4 第四步：实现 read/edit/shell

Section titled “11.4 第四步：实现 read/edit/shell”

第一版推荐顺序：

  1. read_file：只读项目目录内文本文件。
  2. edit_file：只支持 oldString/newString。
  3. run_shell：先只支持白名单命令，例如 ls、cat、npm test。

对应 OpenCode：read.ts:29-39、edit.ts:47-69、shell.ts:260-287。

11.5 第五步：加权限

Section titled “11.5 第五步：加权限”

第一版不要做复杂 ruleset，先做：

对应 OpenCode：permission/index.ts:161-195。

11.6 第六步：加事件输出

Section titled “11.6 第六步：加事件输出”

如果你要接 Web UI，再加：

对应 OpenCode：handlers/event.ts:21-53。

12. 费曼复述区

Section titled “12. 费曼复述区”

12.1 请你用自己的话解释

Section titled “12.1 请你用自己的话解释”

请你不用“agent loop”这个词，向一个 Java 同事解释：

为什么 coding agent 不能只调用一次 LLM？为什么 tool result 必须写回消息历史？

12.2 如果解释不出来，说明卡在这里

Section titled “12.2 如果解释不出来，说明卡在这里”

常见卡点：

  • 以为 tool call 是本地代码主动决定的，而不是模型输出的结构化请求。
  • 以为工具执行完就可以直接把结果给用户，不需要再给模型。
  • 分不清 session message 和 UI event。
  • 分不清 Tool 内部接口和 provider 看到的 tool schema。

12.3 换一种说法再解释

Section titled “12.3 换一种说法再解释”

模型像一个只会发指令的主程。它说“读这个文件”，工具读完文件后，必须把结果告诉主程。主程看完结果，才能决定下一步是修改文件、跑测试，还是回答用户。

13. 练习题

Section titled “13. 练习题”

入门题

Section titled “入门题”
  1. 用 5 句话解释 CLI -> Session -> LLM -> Tool -> LLM。
  2. 写出 mini agent 至少需要的 3 个 tool。
  3. 说明为什么 edit_file 需要权限，而 read_file 第一版可以先宽松一些。

进阶题

Section titled “进阶题”
  1. 把 OpenCode 的 Tool.Context 简化成你自己的 ToolContext。
  2. 写一个 ToolRegistry，输入 agent 名称，返回可用工具集合。
  3. 写一个 PermissionService.ask，支持 allow/deny/ask 三种行为。

源码追踪题

Section titled “源码追踪题”
  1. 从 run.ts:792 的 client.session.prompt 追到 prompt.ts:1211。
  2. 从 prompt.ts:1372 的 SessionTools.resolve 追到 session/tools.ts:75。
  3. 从 session/tools.ts:93 的 item.execute(args, ctx) 追到 edit.ts:69。
  4. 从 edit.ts:98 的 ctx.ask 追到 permission/index.ts:161。
  5. 从 processor.ts:499 的 completeToolCall 回到 prompt.ts:1461-1477 的 continue/break 判断。

小实现题

Section titled “小实现题”

实现一个真正能跑的 mini agent skeleton：

要求：

  1. CLI 接收一句 prompt。
  2. Session 保存 messages 到内存数组。
  3. LLM 先用 fake client：如果用户说 “read package”，就返回 read_file tool call。
  4. Tool 执行后把结果写回 messages。
  5. Loop 再调用 fake LLM，让它输出最终回答。

14. 源码追踪任务

Section titled “14. 源码追踪任务”

请你按下面顺序打开源码，并在旁边写一句“mini agent 里对应什么”：

  1. packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts:768-803
packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts:768-803 
768        if (!args.interactive) {769          const events = await client.event.subscribe()770          loop(client, events).catch((e) => {771            console.error(e)772            process.exit(1)773          })774775          if (args.command) {776            const result = await client.session.command({777              sessionID,778              agent,779              model: args.model,780              command: args.command,781              arguments: message,782              variant: args.variant,783            })784            if (result.error) {785              if (!emit("error", { error: result.error })) UI.error(formatRunError(result.error))786              process.exitCode = 1787            }788            return789          }790791          const model = pick(args.model)792          const result = await client.session.prompt({793            sessionID,794            agent,795            model,796            variant: args.variant,797            parts: [...files, { type: "text", text: message }],798          })799          if (result.error) {800            if (!emit("error", { error: result.error })) UI.error(formatRunError(result.error))801            process.exitCode = 1802          }803          return
  1. packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1211-1230
packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1211-1230 
1211    const prompt: (input: PromptInput) => Effect.Effect<MessageV2.WithParts, Image.Error> = Effect.fn(1212      "SessionPrompt.prompt",1213    )(function* (input: PromptInput) {1214      const session = yield* sessions.get(input.sessionID).pipe(Effect.orDie)1215      yield* revert.cleanup(session)1216      const message = yield* createUserMessage(input)1217      yield* sessions.touch(input.sessionID)12181219      const permissions: Permission.Ruleset = []1220      for (const [t, enabled] of Object.entries(input.tools ?? {})) {1221        permissions.push({ permission: t, action: enabled ? "allow" : "deny", pattern: "*" })1222      }1223      if (permissions.length > 0) {1224        session.permission = permissions1225        yield* sessions.setPermission({ sessionID: session.id, permission: permissions })1226      }12271228      if (input.noReply === true) return message1229      return yield* loop({ sessionID: input.sessionID })1230    })
  1. packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1248-1489
packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1248-1489
